title: How Payment Infrastructure for South Asian Creators Works and How to Set It Up Today — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Ghana, you're probably familiar with the frustration of trying to sell your digital products to customers without a local payment gateway. PayPal and Stripe have shut you down due to geographic restrictions, and you're left with no way to collect payment from your eager customers. You've tried other platforms, but they either require a physical address or have exorbitant fees. It's time to take matters into your own hands and explore alternative payment infrastructure solutions.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The traditional payment gateways have failed you because they're designed to cater to large corporations, not solo creators like yourself. They come with strict requirements and regulations that are impossible to meet, especially when you're operating in a market with limited resources. But what if you could bypass these gateways and connect directly with your customers through a decentralized payment system? This is where blockchain-based solutions come in, offering a more flexible and inclusive way to process transactions.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you begin, make sure you have a digital product to sell, whether it's an ebook, course, or software. You'll also need a way to host and deliver your product, which is where platforms like Core Shop Engine come in. This robust backend engine allows you to automate delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, making it easy to get started without any technical expertise. Additionally, you'll need a wallet to accept payments, which can be set up through services like NOWPayments.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

To set up your payment and delivery pipeline, start by integrating Core Shop Engine with your digital product. This will allow you to automate the delivery process and ensure that your customers receive their products immediately after payment. Next, connect your wallet to NOWPayments, which will enable you to accept a wide range of cryptocurrencies. Finally, configure your payment settings to ensure that transactions are processed securely and efficiently.
Don't let geographic restrictions hold you back from selling your digital products.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once your payment and delivery pipeline is set up, it's time to go live and start selling. Create a sales page that showcases your digital product and includes a clear call-to-action to encourage customers to purchase. Promote your sales page through social media and other marketing channels to attract customers. When a customer makes a purchase, your Core Shop Engine will automatically deliver the product and send a confirmation email to the customer.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

The Full Stack Bundle brings together every component needed to build a global digital store: the Core Shop Engine for backend payment verification and automated delivery, Web3 Wallet Connect for the buyer-facing checkout experience, and the Admin Dashboard for transaction tracking and order management. For creators in restricted markets, this is not a luxury — it is the minimum viable infrastructure for a professional digital business. The bundle includes a deployment guide, priority updates, and Discord support. Total cost is a one-time payment of $79.99. There are no monthly fees, no percentage cuts on sales, and no platform relationship that can be terminated by someone else's compliance decision.

To set up your payment and delivery pipeline, follow these concrete action steps: 1) Integrate Core Shop Engine with your digital product; 2) Connect your wallet to NOWPayments; 3) Configure your payment settings to ensure secure and efficient transactions; 4) Create a sales page that showcases your digital product and includes a clear call-to-action; 5) Promote your sales page through social media and other marketing channels to attract customers. By following these steps, you can get started and start making sales today.
By automating your delivery and payment process, you can save time and increase revenue.
